english: Who was she really, this woman with the quiet smile that never reached her eyes?
notes: Literary register: rhetorical question + appositive 'denne kvinnen' placed after subject for emphasis — a hallmark of literary Bokmål prose style.

norwegian: Klagen ___ behandlet i samsvar med selskapets gjeldende reklamasjonsprosedyrer.
english: The complaint will be handled in accordance with the company's current complaints procedures.
notes: vil bli

norwegian: Den kvelden tenkte hun på alt det hun aldri hadde sagt til ham.
english: That evening she thought of everything she had never said to him.
notes: Literary narrative register: fronted time expression, understated emotional content. The unsaid ('aldri hadde sagt til ham') is a common literary device. Note: 'si noe til noen' requires the preposition 'til' in standard modern Bokmål — 'sagt ham' without 'til' is archaic.

norwegian: Vi ser ikke bort fra at ytterligere tiltak kan bli nødvendige på et senere tidspunkt.
english: We do not rule out that further measures may become necessary at a later stage.
notes: 'Ser ikke bort fra' (do not rule out) + 'på et senere tidspunkt' (at a later stage) — formal hedging constructions typical of press releases and official statements.

norwegian: Hva vet vi egentlig om hva som skjer i hodet på folk når de sover?
english: What do we really know about what happens in people's heads when they sleep?
notes: Popular-science/journalistic register: accessible rhetorical question to engage readers. Contrast with academic 'det foreligger begrenset forskning på...' (b2-aw-007).

norwegian: Søknaden ble avslått under henvisning til manglende dokumentasjon av de ___ opplysningene.
english: The application was rejected with reference to insufficient documentation of the required information.
notes: etterspurte

norwegian: Foran ham lå byen, glittrende og ubønnhørlig som alltid.
english: Before him lay the city, glittering and relentless as always.
notes: Literary register: fronted place adverbial + inversion 'lå byen'; participial and adjectival appositive after noun — typical of literary descriptive prose.

norwegian: Departementet ___ med denne muligheten til å minne om at fristen for innsending er 1. mars.
english: The Ministry takes this opportunity to remind that the deadline for submission is 1 March.
notes: benytter

norwegian: Noen ganger er det de enkle ordene som treffer hardest: 'Jeg vet ikke.'
english: Sometimes it is the simple words that hit hardest: 'I don't know.'
notes: Essay/reflective register: cleft construction for emphasis + colon + quoted fragment for stylistic punch. A recognisable feature of opinion journalism.

norwegian: Det er vanskelig å overvurdere betydningen av god kommunikasjon i en krisesituasjon.
english: It is difficult to overestimate the importance of good communication in a crisis situation.
notes: 'Det er vanskelig å overvurdere betydningen av' — formal evaluative framing used in reports, speeches and opinion pieces.

norwegian: Det er synd du ikke kunne komme — vi savnet deg på festen!
english: It's a shame you couldn't come — we missed you at the party!
notes: Warm informal register: 'synd', 'savnet', exclamation mark. Fully inappropriate in a formal letter; teaches learners to recognise register through multiple markers at once.

norwegian: Selskapet beklager det inntrufne og vil iverksette tiltak for å hindre gjentakelse.
english: The company regrets what has occurred and will implement measures to prevent a recurrence.
notes: 'Det inntrufne' (what has occurred — nominalised past participle), 'iverksette tiltak', 'hindre gjentakelse' — formal corporate apology register.

norwegian: Har du snakket med ham siden? Jeg hørte det ble litt kleint mellom dere.
english: Have you spoken to him since? I heard things got a bit awkward between you.
notes: Informal spoken register: 'kleint' (awkward/uncomfortable) — colloquial adjective; 'siden' as casual time adverb. Impossible to render in formal Bokmål without register shift.

norwegian: Partene er enige om at tvisten ___ løst ved mekling før eventuelt søksmål reises.
english: The parties agree that the dispute shall be resolved through mediation before any lawsuit is filed.
notes: skal

norwegian: Apropos helgen — har du lyst til å bli med på tur til Nordmarka på lørdag?
english: Speaking of the weekend — do you fancy coming on a trip to Nordmarka on Saturday?
notes: 'Apropos' as casual discourse marker; 'ha lyst til å bli med' — informal invitation formula. Teaches learners to recognise and produce informal register transitions.

norwegian: I samsvar med punkt 4.2 i avtalen ___ leverandøren forpliktet til å utbedre manglene innen ti virkedager.
english: In accordance with clause 4.2 of the agreement, the supplier is obligated to remedy the deficiencies within ten working days.
notes: er

norwegian: Æsj, den sausen var helt på trynet! Hvordan klarte de å ødelegge noe så enkelt?
english: Ugh, that sauce was absolutely terrible! How did they manage to ruin something so simple?
notes: 'På trynet' — very informal/slangy expression meaning awful/face-down. Register markers: 'æsj', 'helt på trynet', emphatic rhetorical question.

norwegian: Kunden ___ herved om at garantiperioden for det aktuelle produktet er utløpt.
english: The customer is hereby informed that the warranty period for the product in question has expired.
notes: informeres

norwegian: Tusen takk for i går — det var kjempegøy og maten var helt fantastisk!
english: Thanks so much for yesterday — it was great fun and the food was absolutely fantastic!
notes: Informal thank-you message register: 'kjempegøy', 'helt fantastisk' — informal intensifiers; 'for i går' — casual Norwegian social formula.

norwegian: Styret ønsker med dette å uttrykke sin anerkjennelse for den innsatsen direktøren har ytt i sin funksjonsperiode.
english: The board wishes herewith to express its appreciation for the contribution the director has made during his term of office.
notes: 'Med dette' (herewith), 'anerkjennelse' (appreciation/recognition), 'ytt' (past participle of 'yte' — to contribute/render), 'funksjonsperiode' — all very high formal register.

norwegian: Dere, jeg tror jeg dumpet eksamen. Vet ikke hva jeg skal si til foreldrene mine.
english: Guys, I think I failed the exam. Don't know what to tell my parents.
notes: 'Dere' as informal group address; 'dumpe eksamen' — informal verb for failing. Sentence-initial 'vet ikke' (no subject) — informal ellipsis.

norwegian: Det fremgår av saksdokumentene at beslutningen ble fattet uten tilstrekkelig forankring i styret.
english: It is clear from the case documents that the decision was made without sufficient grounding in the board.
notes: 'Fremgår av saksdokumentene' (is apparent from the case documents), 'tilstrekkelig forankring' (sufficient grounding/anchoring) — formal investigative/governance register.

norwegian: Nå som vi er ferdige med eksamen, ___ vi bare legge oss på sofaen og gjøre absolutt ingenting.
english: Now that we've finished the exams, we can just lie on the sofa and do absolutely nothing.
notes: kan

norwegian: Vi viser til Deres klage datert 3. juni og ønsker å redegjøre for saksforløpet.
english: We refer to your complaint dated 3 June and wish to account for the course of events.
notes: 'Viser til' (refer to), 'datert' (dated), 'redegjøre for' (account for), 'saksforløpet' (course of events) — formal written complaint-response register.

norwegian: Hei, bare en rask beskjed — jeg blir litt sen i dag, maks kvarter.
english: Hi, just a quick message — I'll be a bit late today, fifteen minutes at most.
notes: Casual workplace message register (chat/SMS to colleague): 'bare en rask beskjed', 'maks kvarter' — informal brevity markers. Compare with formal absence notification.

norwegian: Det er grunn til å anta at saken vil medføre ytterligere kostnader, og ___ bør selskapet sette av midler.
english: There is reason to assume that the matter will entail further costs, and the company should therefore set aside funds.
notes: derfor

norwegian: Å nei, ikke fortell meg at kampen er i kveld — jeg hadde totalt glemt det!
english: Oh no, don't tell me the match is tonight — I had totally forgotten!
notes: Informal spoken outburst: 'å nei', 'ikke fortell meg at', 'totalt glemt' — informal intensifier and exclamatory register. Teaches contrast with neutral 'jeg hadde ikke husket at...'.

norwegian: Undertegnede har gjennomgått sakens dokumenter og kan bekrefte at alle formelle krav er oppfylt.
english: The undersigned has reviewed the case documents and can confirm that all formal requirements have been met.
notes: 'Undertegnede' (the undersigned) — very formal self-reference; 'gjennomgått sakens dokumenter', 'formelle krav er oppfylt' — legal/bureaucratic register.

norwegian: Det var ikke meningen å snakke lenge, men når man først begynner, er det vanskelig å stoppe.
english: It wasn't intended to talk for long, but once you start, it's difficult to stop.
notes: Neutral-informal register: self-deprecating conversational opener. Note the shift from 'man' (generic) to implied personal — a neutral spoken register pattern.

norwegian: Saken ___ oversendt kompetent myndighet for videre behandling og endelig avgjørelse.
english: The matter has been forwarded to the competent authority for further processing and final decision.
notes: er blitt

norwegian: Jeg synes du fortjener litt ros — du har virkelig slitt hardt dette semesteret.
english: I think you deserve a bit of praise — you have really worked hard this semester.
notes: Warm spoken register: 'fortjene ros', 'slite hardt' — informal but sincere praise. Not as slangy as b2-nr2-207; teaches middle ground between formal and very informal.

norwegian: På vegne av organisasjonen vil jeg takke alle bidragsytere for deres uvurderlige innsats.
english: On behalf of the organisation, I would like to thank all contributors for their invaluable efforts.
notes: 'På vegne av' (on behalf of), 'bidragsytere' (contributors), 'uvurderlig innsats' (invaluable effort) — formal ceremonial register for speeches and official correspondence.

norwegian: Oi, det visste jeg faktisk ikke! Lærer noe nytt hver dag, liksom.
english: Oh, I actually didn't know that! You learn something new every day, you know.
notes: Informal conversational register: 'oi' (mild surprise), 'faktisk' (actually — spoken filler), 'liksom' — informal discourse particle. Subject-less final clause is informal ellipsis.

norwegian: Kommunen ___ ha mottatt søknaden innen 15. august for at den skal tas under behandling.
english: The municipality must have received the application by 15 August for it to be considered.
notes: må

norwegian: Jeg skjønner ikke helt hva de er ute etter, men det virker som de vil ha noe konkret.
english: I don't quite understand what they're after, but it seems like they want something concrete.
notes: Neutral-informal spoken register: 'ikke helt', 'ute etter' (after/looking for), 'virker som' — common informal hedging expressions.

norwegian: Vi tillater oss å påpeke at de oppgitte opplysningene avviker fra de dokumenter vi sitter inne med.
english: We take the liberty of pointing out that the stated information deviates from the documents in our possession.
notes: 'Tillater oss å påpeke' (take the liberty of pointing out), 'de oppgitte opplysningene' (the stated information), 'sitter inne med' (possess/have in our possession) — very high formal register.

norwegian: Viser til telefonsamtale av i dag og bekrefter herved vår bestilling av 50 enheter.
english: With reference to today's telephone conversation, we hereby confirm our order of 50 units.
notes: Subject-ellipsis in opening: 'viser til' (we refer to) — a standard Norwegian business letter formula where the subject 'vi' is omitted. 'Herved bekrefter' is the full form.

norwegian: Det vil bli avholdt et informasjonsmøte for alle ansatte tirsdag 10. juni klokken 10:00 i møterom A.
english: An information meeting will be held for all employees on Tuesday 10 June at 10:00 in meeting room A.
notes: 'Det vil bli avholdt' — future passive existential construction standard in workplace announcements. Note Norwegian date format and no comma before month.

norwegian: Vi anmoder om at fakturaen ___ vedlagt ved innsending av den fullstendige dokumentasjonen.
english: We request that the invoice be enclosed when submitting the complete documentation.
notes: legges

norwegian: Stillingen krever dokumentert erfaring fra en tilsvarende rolle samt gode samarbeidsevner.
english: The position requires documented experience from a comparable role as well as good collaborative skills.
notes: 'Dokumentert erfaring' (documented experience), 'tilsvarende rolle' (comparable role), 'samarbeidsevner' (collaborative skills) — standard job-advertisement register in Norwegian.

norwegian: Som avtalt sender vi over den reviderte kontrakten for gjennomlesing og godkjenning.
english: As agreed, we are forwarding the revised contract for review and approval.
notes: 'Som avtalt' (as agreed) — standard email opening formula in Norwegian business communication. 'Sende over' is the informal-professional equivalent of the more formal 'oversende'.

norwegian: Vedlagt ___ årsrapport for 2024 samt revisors beretning.
english: Enclosed please find the annual report for 2024 together with the auditor's report.
notes: følger

norwegian: Kandidaten bør ha erfaring med prosjektledelse og beherske norsk og engelsk flytende, både skriftlig og muntlig.
english: The candidate should have project management experience and be fluent in Norwegian and English, both written and spoken.
notes: 'Beherske ... flytende' (be fluent in) — standard CV/job-ad phrase. 'Skriftlig og muntlig' — the Norwegian paired formula for language proficiency.

norwegian: Sykefraværet i avdelingen ___ stabilt på rundt fem prosent gjennom hele kvartalet.
english: Sickness absence in the department remained stable at around five per cent throughout the quarter.
notes: holdt seg

norwegian: Vi setter pris på Deres interesse for stillingen og inviterer Dem herved til intervju torsdag 20. juni.
english: We appreciate your interest in the position and hereby invite you to an interview on Thursday 20 June.
notes: Formal job-interview invitation: 'Dem/Deres' formal address, 'herved inviterer' — formal placement of adverb. Note: Norwegian invitation letters use the formal T/V distinction more than everyday speech.

norwegian: For ytterligere informasjon ber vi Dem ta kontakt med vår kundeservice på telefon eller e-post.
english: For further information, we ask that you contact our customer service by telephone or email.
notes: Standard Norwegian customer-service closing formula: 'ber vi Dem ta kontakt med' — formal address with V2 after fronted prepositional phrase.

norwegian: Arbeidsavtalen regulerer partenes rettigheter og plikter og ___ av begge parter innen 14 dager.
english: The employment contract regulates the rights and obligations of both parties and must be signed by both parties within 14 days.
notes: skal signeres

norwegian: Vi viser til vår tidligere korrespondanse og ønsker å informere om at saken nå er avklart.
english: We refer to our previous correspondence and wish to inform you that the matter has now been resolved.
notes: 'Viser til vår tidligere korrespondanse' — standard professional letter continuation formula. 'Avklart' (resolved/clarified) — professional register word for resolved.

norwegian: Med forbehold om endringer forbeholder selskapet seg retten til å justere prisene med tre måneders varsel.
english: Subject to changes, the company reserves the right to adjust prices with three months' notice.
notes: 'Med forbehold om' (subject to), 'forbeholder seg retten til' (reserves the right to) — legal-commercial register. 'Med tre måneders varsel' (with three months' notice) — the genitive-s on 'måneders' is obligatory in this construction; 'tre måneder varsel' without the genitive-s is incorrect.

norwegian: Rapporten ___ til den administrative ledelsen innen utgangen av neste uke.
english: The report must be submitted to the administrative management by the end of next week.
notes: skal leveres

norwegian: Vi takker for godt samarbeid og ser frem til å videreføre forretningsforbindelsen i kommende år.
english: We thank you for the good cooperation and look forward to continuing the business relationship in the coming years.
notes: Standard professional closing formula: 'takke for godt samarbeid', 'videreføre forretningsforbindelsen' — set phrases in Norwegian business letters.

norwegian: Det er dessverre ikke mulig å imøtekomme søknaden da stillingen allerede er besatt.
english: Unfortunately it is not possible to accommodate the application as the position has already been filled.
notes: 'Imøtekomme søknaden' (accommodate/grant the application) — formal rejection formula; 'stillingen er besatt' (the position is filled) — standard HR register.

norwegian: Som ledd i internkontrollarbeidet ___ alle ansatte om å gjennomføre det obligatoriske HMS-kurset innen 31. desember.
english: As part of the internal control work, all employees are reminded to complete the mandatory HSE course by 31 December.
notes: påminnes

norwegian: Stillingen er fast og lønnes etter statens regulativ, lønnsgruppe 50–55 avhengig av kvalifikasjoner.
english: The position is permanent and paid according to the state pay scale, pay grade 50–55 depending on qualifications.
notes: 'Lønnes etter statens regulativ' — the Norwegian public sector standard salary formula; 'lønnsgruppe' (pay grade) — specific to Norwegian public employment. Teaches authentic register.

norwegian: Vi gjør oppmerksom på at garantien ikke dekker skader som skyldes feilbruk eller ytre påvirkning.
english: We would like to draw your attention to the fact that the warranty does not cover damage caused by misuse or external influence.
notes: 'Gjøre oppmerksom på at' — formal attention-drawing formula (cf. b2-nr-022); 'feilbruk' (misuse), 'ytre påvirkning' (external influence) — standard warranty-document register.

norwegian: Eventuelle merknader til det vedlagte utkastet ___ innen 1. august til prosjektansvarlig.
english: Any comments on the attached draft should be sent to the project manager by 1 August.
notes: sendes

norwegian: Vi ber om bekreftelse på at de avtalte leveringsbetingelsene er akseptable for begge parter.
english: We ask for confirmation that the agreed delivery terms are acceptable to both parties.
notes: 'Be om bekreftelse på at' — formal request for confirmation; 'leveringsbetingelser' (delivery terms) — commercial Norwegian compound.

norwegian: Det er en forutsetning for ansettelse at søkeren kan fremlegge tilfredsstillende politiattest.
english: A prerequisite for employment is that the applicant can provide a satisfactory police certificate.
notes: 'Forutsetning for ansettelse' (prerequisite for employment), 'fremlegge politiattest' (produce a police certificate) — standard Norwegian public sector and childcare-sector hiring formula.

norwegian: Iht. gjeldende personopplysningslov ___ alle innsamlede data anonymiseres etter prosjektets avslutning.
english: According to the applicable personal data act, all collected data must be anonymised after the conclusion of the project.
notes: skal

norwegian: Vi har gleden av å meddele at budet på prosjektet er akseptert, og at kontraktsforhandlingene begynner mandag.
english: We are pleased to inform you that the bid for the project has been accepted and that contract negotiations begin on Monday.
notes: 'Har gleden av å meddele' — the standard idiomatic Norwegian formal positive-notification formula. 'Glade for å meddele' is a direct anglicism and should be avoided. 'Budet er akseptert' (the bid is accepted), 'kontraktsforhandlinger' — professional procurement register.

norwegian: Dersom fakturaen ikke er betalt innen forfall, ___ forsinkelsesrenter i samsvar med forsinkelsesrenteloven.
english: If the invoice is not paid by the due date, late payment interest will be charged in accordance with the Late Payment Interest Act.
notes: påløper

norwegian: Vi ønsker å presisere at ansvaret for eventuelle skader under transport er leverandørens, med mindre annet er skriftlig avtalt.
english: We wish to clarify that responsibility for any damage during transport lies with the supplier, unless otherwise agreed in writing.
notes: 'Presisere' (clarify/specify), 'med mindre annet er skriftlig avtalt' — standard commercial contract clause; 'med mindre' (unless) is formal. Key register marker: 'med mindre' vs. informal 'hvis ikke'.

norwegian: Først og fremst må vi se på de økonomiske konsekvensene. Dernest bør vi vurdere de sosiale følgene.
english: First and foremost we must look at the economic consequences. Next we should consider the social implications.
notes: Additive listing connectors 'først og fremst' / 'dernest' signal paragraph-level theme progression.

norwegian: Rapporten tar for seg tre hovedtemaer. Det første handler om klimaendringer, det andre om energiforbruk og det tredje om politiske tiltak.
english: The report addresses three main themes. The first concerns climate change, the second energy consumption, and the third political measures.
notes: Enumeration reference chain: 'det første … det andre … det tredje' — anaphoric listing that holds paragraph together.

norwegian: Resultatene peker i samme retning som tidligere forskning. Dette styrker tilliten til funnene ytterligere.
english: The results point in the same direction as earlier research. This strengthens confidence in the findings further.
notes: Demonstrative 'dette' as sentence-initial topic reference to the entire prior proposition — classic theme-rheme continuity.

norwegian: Tiltaket ble godt mottatt i nord. I sør var situasjonen en helt annen, og det ble klart at tiltaket ikke ville fungere uten lokale tilpasninger. ___ valgte myndighetene å revidere planen for den sørlige regionen.
english: The measure was well received in the north. In the south the situation was completely different, and it became clear that the measure would not work without local adaptations. Consequently, the authorities chose to revise the plan for the southern region.
notes: Følgelig

norwegian: Mange faktorer spiller inn. Den viktigste av disse er likevel den langsiktige finansieringen av prosjektet.
english: Many factors come into play. The most important of these is, however, the long-term financing of the project.
notes: 'Den viktigste av disse' — anaphoric superlative reference; 'likevel' signals the ranking concession within the set.

norwegian: Befolkningens tillit til institusjonene er høy i Norge. Dette skyldes blant annet et transparent rettssystem og lav korrupsjon.
english: Public trust in institutions is high in Norway. This is due in part to a transparent legal system and low corruption.
notes: 'Dette skyldes' — causal cohesive link where 'dette' picks up the entire prior sentence as its antecedent.

norwegian: Artikkelen behandler tre problemstillinger: for det første spørsmålet om representasjon, for det andre fordelingen av ressurser og ___ spørsmålet om legitimitet.
english: The article addresses three questions: first the issue of representation, second the distribution of resources, and third the question of legitimacy.
notes: for det tredje

norwegian: Innledningen presenterer bakgrunnen for studien. I tillegg gis det en oversikt over relevant litteratur.
english: The introduction presents the background for the study. In addition an overview of relevant literature is provided.
notes: 'I tillegg' fronted — additive connector triggering V2; impersonal passive 'gis det' in the second clause.

norwegian: Prosjektet ble forsinket på grunn av tekniske problemer. Som et resultat av dette ble budsjettet overskredet.
english: The project was delayed because of technical problems. As a result of this the budget was exceeded.
notes: 'Som et resultat av dette' — consequential connector with anaphoric 'dette'; entire phrase fronted with V2.

norwegian: Undersøkelsen avdekket store regionale variasjoner. Disse variasjonene kan dels forklares med demografiske forskjeller og dels med ulik tilgang til ressurser.
english: The study revealed large regional variations. These variations can partly be explained by demographic differences and partly by differing access to resources.
notes: 'Disse variasjonene' — noun-phrase anaphora recycling the rheme of sentence 1 as the theme of sentence 2; 'dels … dels' parallel partitive structure.

norwegian: Funnene er interessante, men den lille utvalgsstørrelsen begrenser mulighetene for generalisering. ___ gir studien et solid grunnlag for videre forskning.
english: The findings are interesting, but the small sample size limits the possibilities for generalisation. Nonetheless, the study provides a solid foundation for further research.
notes: Likevel

norwegian: Teorien er godt dokumentert i vestlig forskning. Det samme gjelder imidlertid ikke nødvendigvis i andre kulturelle kontekster.
english: The theory is well documented in Western research. The same does not necessarily apply, however, in other cultural contexts.
notes: 'Det samme' — pronominal reference to the prior proposition; 'imidlertid' inserted parenthetically to soften the contrast.

norwegian: Det er bred enighet om at noe må gjøres. Spørsmålet er snarere hva som bør gjøres og hvem som skal finansiere det.
english: There is broad agreement that something must be done. The question is rather what should be done and who should finance it.
notes: 'Snarere' — scalar contrast marker shifting the discourse from a settled to an open question; topic shift signalled lexically.

norwegian: Dataene ble innhentet over en periode på to år. ___ ble de analysert ved hjelp av statistiske metoder.
english: The data were collected over a period of two years. Thereafter they were analysed using statistical methods.
notes: Deretter

norwegian: Rapporten konkluderer med at tiltakene har hatt begrenset effekt. Denne konklusjonen er i tråd med funnene fra andre studier på feltet.
english: The report concludes that the measures have had limited effect. This conclusion is in line with the findings from other studies in the field.
notes: 'Denne konklusjonen' — noun-phrase anaphora that both echoes and elevates the prior rheme into the new theme.

norwegian: Den første studien fokuserte på kortsiktige effekter. Den foreliggende studien tar derimot sikte på å kartlegge langsiktige virkninger.
english: The first study focused on short-term effects. The present study, by contrast, aims to map long-term impacts.
notes: 'Derimot' — contrastive connector mid-clause signalling opposition between old and new research; 'den foreliggende' is formal anaphoric adjective.

norwegian: Problemet er velkjent. ___ mangler det fortsatt effektive løsninger på nasjonalt nivå.
english: The problem is well known. Nevertheless, effective solutions are still lacking at the national level.
notes: Likevel

norwegian: Studien har flere sterke sider. Den er metodisk solid, utvalget er representativt og dataene er innhentet på en pålitelig måte. Alt i alt gir dette et godt grunnlag for konklusjonene.
english: The study has several strong points. It is methodologically sound, the sample is representative and the data have been collected reliably. All in all this provides a good basis for the conclusions.
notes: 'Alt i alt' — summarising connector at paragraph boundary; 'dette' picks up all three preceding clauses as a complex antecedent.

norwegian: De kvantitative dataene viser en klar trend. De kvalitative intervjuene nyanserer imidlertid dette bildet betraktelig.
english: The quantitative data show a clear trend. The qualitative interviews, however, nuance this picture considerably.
notes: 'dette bildet' — anaphoric noun phrase that packages the prior claim as a referent; 'imidlertid' inserted parenthetically for formal contrast.

norwegian: Det er bred politisk enighet om målet. Midlene for å nå dette målet er det derimot stor uenighet om.
english: There is broad political agreement on the goal. The means of reaching this goal are, by contrast, a matter of great disagreement.
notes: 'dette målet' — anaphoric reference; object fronted for contrastive focus ('Midlene … er det … uenighet om') — theme-rheme reversal.

norwegian: Hypotesen ble bekreftet av de kvantitative dataene. De kvalitative funnene pekte i samme retning. Samlet sett er dette et overbevisende resultat.
english: The hypothesis was confirmed by the quantitative data. The qualitative findings pointed in the same direction. Taken together, this is a convincing result.
notes: 'Samlet sett' — summarising frame connector; 'dette' at sentence start picks up both prior sentences as a complex antecedent.

norwegian: Avhandlingen består av fem kapitler. Tre av disse er viet en analyse av det empiriske materialet, ___ de to siste tar for seg teoretiske implikasjoner.
english: The thesis consists of five chapters. Three of these are devoted to an analysis of the empirical material, while the last two address theoretical implications.
notes: mens

norwegian: Innledningen reiser et sentralt spørsmål: i hvilken grad påvirker sosial bakgrunn akademiske prestasjoner? Resten av artikkelen forsøker å besvare nettopp dette spørsmålet.
english: The introduction raises a central question: to what extent does social background affect academic achievement? The rest of the article attempts to answer precisely this question.
notes: 'nettopp dette spørsmålet' — intensified anaphoric noun phrase that explicitly closes the thematic loop opened in sentence 1.

norwegian: Studien har avdekket tre mønstre. Det første mønsteret er kjennetegnet av rask fremgang, det andre av stagnasjon og ___ av gradvis tilbakegang.
english: The study has revealed three patterns. The first pattern is characterised by rapid progress, the second by stagnation, and the third by gradual regression.
notes: det tredje

norwegian: I denne artikkelen argumenteres det for at en sterkere regulering av finansmarkedene er nødvendig for å hindre fremtidige kriser.
english: In this article it is argued that stronger regulation of financial markets is necessary to prevent future crises.
notes: Impersonal passive 'argumenteres det for at' — standard academic framing for presenting a thesis without a personal subject.

norwegian: Nominalisering er et sentralt trekk ved akademisk skriving. I stedet for å skrive 'å analysere' velger forfattere ofte formen '___ av data'.
english: Nominalisation is a central feature of academic writing. Instead of writing 'to analyse', authors often choose the form 'analysis of data'.
notes: analyse

norwegian: Ifølge Smith og Jones (2021) er det grunn til å anta at sammenhengen er sterkere enn tidligere antatt.
english: According to Smith and Jones (2021) there is reason to assume that the relationship is stronger than previously assumed.
notes: Citation framing with 'ifølge' + parenthetical reference; hedging via 'er det grunn til å anta at'.

norwegian: Det kan ikke utelukkes at de observerte effektene skyldes konfunderende variabler snarere enn selve intervensjonen.
english: It cannot be excluded that the observed effects are due to confounding variables rather than the intervention itself.
notes: 'det kan ikke utelukkes at' — strong hedging via double negation; 'snarere enn' (rather than) — formal scalar contrast.

norwegian: Studien benytter seg av en triangulerende tilnærming der kvantitative og kvalitative metoder ___ hverandre.
english: The study employs a triangulating approach in which quantitative and qualitative methods complement each other.
notes: utfyller

norwegian: Det foreligger sterk empirisk støtte for at regelmessig fysisk aktivitet reduserer risikoen for hjerte- og karsykdommer.
english: There is strong empirical support for the claim that regular physical activity reduces the risk of cardiovascular disease.
notes: 'det foreligger' — formal existential; 'empirisk støtte for at' — academic claim-support framing.

norwegian: Det bør presiseres at begrepet brukes i en snever teknisk forstand i denne sammenhengen.
english: It should be specified that the term is used in a narrow technical sense in this context.
notes: 'det bør presiseres at' — terminological caveat marker; 'i en snever teknisk forstand' — lexical hedging of concept scope.

norwegian: Tidligere forskning har i stor grad fokusert på makronivå. Den ___ studien skiller seg fra dette ved å ta et mikroperspektiv.
english: Earlier research has to a large extent focused on the macro level. The present study distinguishes itself from this by taking a micro perspective.
notes: foreliggende

norwegian: Funnene gir grunnlag for å hevde at det eksisterer en kausal sammenheng mellom de to variablene.
english: The findings provide grounds for claiming that a causal relationship exists between the two variables.
notes: 'gir grunnlag for å hevde at' — calibrated claim strength; stronger than 'antyder' but avoids the certainty of 'beviser'.

norwegian: Som tidligere nevnt er det nødvendig å skille mellom kortsiktige og langsiktige effekter av politikken.
english: As previously mentioned, it is necessary to distinguish between the short-term and long-term effects of the policy.
notes: 'Som tidligere nevnt' — intertextual backward reference marker; 'å skille mellom' — standard academic precision verb.

norwegian: Teorien har vunnet bred ___ i faglitteraturen, men er ikke uten kritikere.
english: The theory has gained broad acceptance in the academic literature, but is not without its critics.
notes: tilslutning

norwegian: Metodiske begrensninger til side, gir studien et verdifullt bidrag til forståelsen av fenomenet.
english: Methodological limitations aside, the study makes a valuable contribution to the understanding of the phenomenon.
notes: Fronted absolute phrase 'metodiske begrensninger til side' — formal academic hedging that brackets a caveat before the main claim.

norwegian: Det er rimelig å slutte seg til at årsaksforholdet går i én retning snarere enn å være gjensidig.
english: It is reasonable to conclude that the causal relationship runs in one direction rather than being mutual.
notes: 'slutte seg til at' — academic conclusion verb; 'snarere enn å være' introduces the scalar alternative.

norwegian: På grunnlag av de foreliggende dataene er det ikke mulig å trekke entydige slutninger om årsaksforholdet.
english: On the basis of the available data it is not possible to draw unambiguous conclusions about the causal relationship.
notes: 'entydige slutninger' — precision hedging noun phrase; 'på grunnlag av' is the formal equivalent of 'basert på'.

norwegian: Det undersøkes i denne studien hvorvidt eksponering for støy i barndommen ___ risikoen for hørselstap i voksen alder.
english: This study examines whether exposure to noise in childhood increases the risk of hearing loss in adult life.
notes: øker

norwegian: Til tross for disse innvendingene holder konklusjonene seg robuste på tvers av ulike analytiske tilnærminger.
english: Despite these objections, the conclusions remain robust across different analytical approaches.
notes: 'holder seg robuste på tvers av' — formal robustness claim; 'disse innvendingene' is anaphoric reference to anticipated objections.

norwegian: Det er all grunn til å anta at funnene kan ___ til andre populasjoner med lignende demografiske kjennetegn.
english: There is every reason to assume that the findings can be generalised to other populations with similar demographic characteristics.
notes: generaliseres

norwegian: Behovet for ytterligere forskning er tydelig, særlig med tanke på de langsiktige effektene av intervensjonen.
english: The need for further research is clear, particularly with regard to the long-term effects of the intervention.
notes: 'med tanke på' — formal prepositional phrase for scope specification; nominalised subject 'behovet' is more formal than 'vi trenger'.

norwegian: Det er viktig å ___ at de her presenterte dataene er hentet fra et begrenset geografisk område.
english: It is important to emphasise that the data presented here are taken from a limited geographical area.
notes: understreke

norwegian: Denne studien supplerer eksisterende forskning ved å tilby et komparativt perspektiv som tidligere har manglet i litteraturen.
english: This study supplements existing research by offering a comparative perspective that has previously been absent from the literature.
notes: 'supplerer … ved å tilby' — formal gap-filling contribution framing; 'som tidligere har manglet i litteraturen' identifies the gap.

norwegian: Funnene er i stor grad forenlige med de teoretiske ___ som ble fremsatt i innledningen.
english: The findings are largely compatible with the theoretical predictions that were put forward in the introduction.
notes: prediksjonene

norwegian: Studiens fremste begrensning er det relativt lille utvalget, noe som svekker den statistiske styrken til analysene.
english: The study's foremost limitation is the relatively small sample, which reduces the statistical power of the analyses.
notes: 'noe som' — non-restrictive relative clause referring to the entire preceding proposition; 'statistisk styrke' is a technical academic term.

norwegian: Det vil si at hypotesen kun kan avvises dersom det foreligger statistisk signifikante bevis til ___ for nullhypotesen.
english: That is to say, the hypothesis can only be rejected if there is statistically significant evidence in favour of the null hypothesis.
notes: fordel

norwegian: I lys av den pågående debatten tar denne studien sikte på å kaste nytt lys over et lenge omstridt spørsmål.
english: In light of the ongoing debate, this study aims to shed new light on a long-contested question.
notes: 'tar sikte på å kaste nytt lys over' — academic purpose framing; 'lenge omstridt' is a formal participial adjective.

norwegian: Det er påvist at eksponering for høye lydnivåer over tid kan ___ til permanente hørselsskader.
english: It has been demonstrated that exposure to high noise levels over time can lead to permanent hearing damage.
notes: føre

norwegian: Forfatteren anerkjenner at de valgte metodene ikke er perfekte, men argumenterer likevel for at de er de best egnede for dette formålet.
english: The author acknowledges that the chosen methods are not perfect, but nonetheless argues that they are the most appropriate for this purpose.
notes: 'anerkjenner at … men argumenterer likevel for at' — concessive-claim structure; 'best egnede' is a formal superlative for suitability.

norwegian: Avslutningsvis kan det konstateres at de oppstilte målene i ___ grad er nådd.
english: In conclusion it can be established that the stated goals have largely been reached.
notes: stor

norwegian: Det diskuteres fortsatt om reformen bør gjennomføres, og ingen endelig beslutning er tatt.
english: It is still being discussed whether the reform should be implemented, and no final decision has been taken.
notes: S-passive 'diskuteres' — agentless ongoing process; coordinated with stative passive 'er tatt' to contrast process vs. resulting state.

norwegian: Budsjettet ble vedtatt med knappest mulig flertall og ___ allerede neste kvartal.
english: The budget was passed with the slimmest possible majority and will be revised already next quarter.
notes: revideres

norwegian: Alle søknadene vil bli behandlet fortløpende, og svar kan forventes innen tre uker.
english: All applications will be processed on a rolling basis, and a reply can be expected within three weeks.
notes: Two passive types: future bli-passive 'vil bli behandlet' and modal s-passive 'kan forventes' — both agentless in administrative register.

norwegian: Det rapporteres at flere ansatte er blitt utsatt for trakassering på arbeidsplassen.
english: It is reported that several employees have been subjected to harassment in the workplace.
notes: Nested passives: s-passive 'rapporteres' + present perfect bli-passive 'er blitt utsatt for' in the embedded clause.

norwegian: Prøvene ble tatt på mandag og sendes nå til analyse ved et eksternt laboratorium.
english: The samples were taken on Monday and are now being sent for analysis at an external laboratory.
notes: 'ble tatt' (bli-passive past) contrasted with 'sendes' (s-passive present) — tense shift illustrating temporal contrast within same sentence.

norwegian: Kontrakten er ennå ikke ___, selv om forhandlingene ble avsluttet for to uker siden.
english: The contract has not yet been signed, even though the negotiations were concluded two weeks ago.
notes: signert

norwegian: Det er ikke kjent hvem som ga ordren, men den ble fulgt av alle tilstedeværende.
english: It is not known who gave the order, but it was followed by all those present.
notes: Stative passive 'er ikke kjent' (unknown state) + agentive bli-passive 'ble fulgt av'; impersonal 'det'-subject in both.

norwegian: Nye retningslinjer er utarbeidet av komiteen og vil ___ til alle ansatte i løpet av neste uke.
english: New guidelines have been drawn up by the committee and will be distributed to all employees during next week.
notes: bli distribuert

norwegian: Det hevdes i rapporten at en stor andel av utslippene skyldes transportsektoren.
english: It is claimed in the report that a large proportion of the emissions are caused by the transport sector.
notes: 'det hevdes i rapporten at' — s-passive of reporting verb; agentless impersonal construction used to attribute a claim to a source.

norwegian: Feilen ble oppdaget tidlig og ___ umiddelbart av det ansvarlige vedlikeholdsselskapet.
english: The fault was detected early and was immediately rectified by the responsible maintenance company.
notes: ble utbedret

norwegian: Saken er til behandling og kan ikke kommenteres offentlig før en avgjørelse er truffet.
english: The matter is under consideration and cannot be commented on publicly before a decision has been reached.
notes: Modal s-passive 'kan ikke kommenteres'; stative passive 'er truffet' in subordinate temporal clause — passive in subordinate clause target.

norwegian: Pengene ble overført, men transaksjonen ___ dessverre ikke bekreftet av banken.
english: The money was transferred, but the transaction was unfortunately not confirmed by the bank.
notes: ble

norwegian: Det konstateres i studien at en sammenheng mellom de to faktorene ikke kan utelukkes.
english: The study establishes that a relationship between the two factors cannot be excluded.
notes: S-passive of epistemic verb 'konstateres' + modal s-passive 'kan utelukkes' in embedded clause — double passive structure.

norwegian: Det ble ikke tatt hensyn til de lokale forholdene da planen ble utformet.
english: No account was taken of local conditions when the plan was drawn up.
notes: Impersonal passive 'ble tatt hensyn til' — the idiom 'ta hensyn til' passivised; passive in subordinate 'da'-clause in the same sentence.

norwegian: Prisene justeres automatisk hvert år i henhold til konsumprisindeksen.
english: Prices are adjusted automatically every year in accordance with the consumer price index.
notes: S-passive 'justeres' — agentless habitual passive describing a rule-governed process; no 'bli' needed for generic present.

norwegian: Boken er oversatt til over tjue språk og ___ i mer enn femti land.
english: The book has been translated into over twenty languages and is sold in more than fifty countries.
notes: selges

norwegian: Det må erkjennes at ikke alle målene som ble satt i starten av prosjektet, er blitt nådd.
english: It must be acknowledged that not all the goals set at the start of the project have been reached.
notes: Modal s-passive 'må erkjennes' at matrix level; relative clause with passive 'som ble satt'; present perfect passive 'er blitt nådd' — three passive constructions.

norwegian: Undersøkelsen viser at mange pasienter ___ for lenge uten riktig diagnose.
english: The survey shows that many patients are treated for too long without a correct diagnosis.
notes: behandles

norwegian: Avtalen ble undertegnet i Oslo og trer i kraft fra den første i neste måned.
english: The agreement was signed in Oslo and comes into force from the first of next month.
notes: 'ble undertegnet' — agentless bli-passive; followed by active idiom 'trer i kraft' — the contrast between passive event and active process.

norwegian: Det ___ av tallene i årsrapporten at selskapet har hatt et underskudd tre år på rad.
english: It emerges from the figures in the annual report that the company has had a deficit for three consecutive years.
notes: fremgår

norwegian: Journalisten ble ikke gitt innsyn i dokumentene, selv om hun hadde bedt om dette gjentatte ganger.
english: The journalist was not given access to the documents, even though she had requested this repeatedly.
notes: 'ble ikke gitt innsyn i' — indirect-object passive; the recipient becomes the grammatical subject; 'selv om'-clause adds subordinate context.

norwegian: Systemet er utviklet over mange år og ___ nå av over en million brukere daglig.
english: The system has been developed over many years and is now used by over one million users daily.
notes: brukes

norwegian: De nye reglene er blitt kritisert av næringslivet, men støttes av et flertall i befolkningen.
english: The new rules have been criticised by business, but are supported by a majority of the population.
notes: Present perfect bli-passive 'er blitt kritisert av' contrasted with s-passive 'støttes av' — two passive types in one sentence, both agentive.

norwegian: Det ble stilt strenge krav til leverandørene, og disse kravene er ___ i den reviderte kontrakten.
english: Strict requirements were placed on the suppliers, and these requirements are enshrined in the revised contract.
notes: nedfelt

norwegian: Tillatelsen er søkt, men ennå ikke innvilget av kommunen.
english: The permit has been applied for, but has not yet been granted by the municipality.
notes: Stative perfect passive 'er søkt' elliptical (applied for) paired with negated stative passive 'ikke innvilget av kommunen' — common administrative pattern.

norwegian: Det er sjelden at en slik pris ___ til en forsker som ennå ikke har fylt førti år.
english: It is rare for such a prize to be awarded to a researcher who has not yet turned forty.
notes: tildeles

norwegian: Hele bydelen måtte evakueres etter at en gasstank var blitt skadet under arbeider på stedet.
english: The entire district had to be evacuated after a gas tank had been damaged during work at the site.
notes: Modal s-passive 'måtte evakueres' in main clause; pluperfect passive 'var blitt skadet' in 'etter at'-subordinate — passive in subordinate clause.

norwegian: Det bekreftes nå at alle planlagte avganger ___ innstilt på grunn av det ekstreme uværet.
english: It is now confirmed that all planned departures have been cancelled due to the extreme weather.
notes: er blitt

norwegian: Ansvaret for ulykken er foreløpig ikke plassert, men en gransking er igangsatt av Luftfartstilsynet.
english: Responsibility for the accident has not yet been allocated, but an investigation has been initiated by the Civil Aviation Authority.
notes: Two stative passives with different agents: agentless 'er ikke plassert' and agentive 'er igangsatt av Luftfartstilsynet' — choice of s-passive vs. bli-passive.

norwegian: Det forutsettes at alle deltakerne ___ seg til de etiske retningslinjene som er fastsatt av komiteen.
english: It is presupposed that all participants will adhere to the ethical guidelines that have been established by the committee.
notes: holder
